name: EfficientNetB1
fullName: EfficientNet: Rethinking Model Scaling for Convolutional Neural Networks (B1)
description: EfficientNet: Rethinking Model Scaling for Convolutional Neural Networks (B1) scaled using compound scaling values.

educationalNote.summary: Retinal layer receiving raw RGB pixel matrices.
educationalNote.detailed: Accepts normalized three-channel RGB images of size 224x224. This spatial standardization ensures weight compatibility in subsequent layers.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Establishes spatial dimensions for the network.
educationalNote.keyTakeaway: Fixed input sizes are critical to prevent spatial alignment errors.

educationalNote.summary: Performs dynamic rescaling and normalization of input pixels.
educationalNote.detailed: Scales and normalizes input image pixel ranges to match train bounds.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Prevents gradient saturation on early convolutions.

educationalNote.summary: Zero padding for the stem conv.
educationalNote.detailed: Pads borders to control dimensions.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Ensures boundary pixel convolving.

calculationSteps.label: Kernel Weights
calculationSteps.explanation: Stem convolution maps input channels to scaled filters.

educationalNote.detailed: Captures baseline visual primitives and shrinks resolution by 50%.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Shrinks image bounds early to reduce compute scales.

calculationSteps.label: Trainable Parameters (gamma, beta)
calculationSteps.explanation: Scale parameter (gamma) and shift parameter (beta) for active channel scaling.

calculationSteps.label: Non-trainable Parameters (mean, variance)
calculationSteps.explanation: Running mean and running variance tracked during training to normalize inference inputs.

educationalNote.detailed: Swish: x * sigmoid(x). Smooth, non-monotonic curve that outperforms ReLU on deep models.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Core activation in EfficientNet design.

calculationSteps.label: Depthwise weights
calculationSteps.explanation: Kernel weights convolving over spatial maps.

educationalNote.detailed: Applies independent kernels over each channel to model spatial details.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Saves computing parameters dramatically.

calculationSteps.label: Trainable Parameters (gamma, beta)
calculationSteps.explanation: Scale parameter (gamma) and shift parameter (beta) for active channel scaling.

calculationSteps.label: Non-trainable Parameters (mean, variance)
calculationSteps.explanation: Running mean and running variance tracked during training to normalize inference inputs.

educationalNote.detailed: Collapses spatial dimensions to form channel global context vectors.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Used to model interdependencies between channels.
educationalNote.keyTakeaway: Collapses spatial details to channel context.

educationalNote.detailed: Compresses channel features to 8 with bias.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Controls SE param size.

educationalNote.summary: SE expand layer with sigmoid activation.
educationalNote.detailed: Expands bottleneck back to output scales.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Gives weights representing importance of channels.

educationalNote.detailed: Multiplies feature maps with SE weights.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Controls channel attention dynamics.

calculationSteps.label: Project weights
calculationSteps.explanation: Compresses channel bottleneck.

educationalNote.detailed: Compresses channel features back to 16 dimensions.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Linear bottlenecks prevent activation information losses.

calculationSteps.explanation: Scale parameter (gamma) and shift parameter (beta) for active channel scaling.

educationalNote.detailed: Adds bottleneck output directly to block input.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Avoids gradient vanishing issues.

calculationSteps.label: Expand weights
calculationSteps.explanation: 1x1 expansion convolution.

educationalNote.detailed: Expands the input dimension from 16 to 96 channels.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Prepares channels for subsequent depthwise convolutions.

educationalNote.whyItMatters: Prepares channels for subsequent depthwise convolutions.

calculationSteps.label: Trainable Parameters (gamma, beta)
calculationSteps.explanation: Scale parameter (gamma) and shift parameter (beta) for active channel scaling.

calculationSteps.label: Non-trainable Parameters (mean, variance)
calculationSteps.explanation: Running mean and running variance tracked during training to normalize inference inputs.

calculationSteps.label: Depthwise weights
calculationSteps.explanation: Kernel weights convolving over spatial maps.

educationalNote.detailed: Applies independent kernels over each channel to model spatial details.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Saves computing parameters dramatically.

calculationSteps.label: Trainable Parameters (gamma, beta)
calculationSteps.explanation: Scale parameter (gamma) and shift parameter (beta) for active channel scaling.

calculationSteps.label: Non-trainable Parameters (mean, variance)
calculationSteps.explanation: Running mean and running variance tracked during training to normalize inference inputs.

educationalNote.detailed: Collapses spatial dimensions to form channel global context vectors.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Used to model interdependencies between channels.
educationalNote.keyTakeaway: Collapses spatial details to channel context.

educationalNote.detailed: Compresses channel features to 20 with bias.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Controls SE param size.

educationalNote.summary: SE expand layer with sigmoid activation.
educationalNote.detailed: Expands bottleneck back to output scales.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Gives weights representing importance of channels.

educationalNote.detailed: Multiplies feature maps with SE weights.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Controls channel attention dynamics.

calculationSteps.label: Project weights
calculationSteps.explanation: Compresses channel bottleneck.

educationalNote.detailed: Compresses channel features back to 112 dimensions.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Linear bottlenecks prevent activation information losses.

educationalNote.detailed: Averages spatial dimensions to form a global feature vector.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Saves compute parameter sizes.
educationalNote.keyTakeaway: Replaces heavy fully connected layers with zero parameters.

calculationSteps.label: Weights
calculationSteps.explanation: Fully connected mapping weights.

educationalNote.summary: Computes probabilities for the 1,000 target classes.
educationalNote.detailed: Uses softmax activation function to compute class probabilities.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Converts numerical logits into values that sum to 1.

groups.name: Input Stem
groups.description: Stem block using Swish activation.

groups.name: MBConv Block 1a
groups.description: MBConv bottleneck: 1x1 expand → 3x3 dwconv → SE → 1x1 projection.

groups.name: MBConv Block 1b
groups.description: MBConv bottleneck: 1x1 expand → 3x3 dwconv → SE → 1x1 projection.

groups.name: MBConv Block 2a
groups.description: MBConv bottleneck: 1x1 expand → 3x3 dwconv → SE → 1x1 projection.

groups.name: MBConv Block 2c
groups.description: MBConv bottleneck: 1x1 expand → 3x3 dwconv → SE → 1x1 projection.

groups.name: MBConv Block 3a
groups.description: MBConv bottleneck: 1x1 expand → 5x5 dwconv → SE → 1x1 projection.

groups.name: MBConv Block 3b

groups.name: MBConv Block 3c
groups.description: MBConv bottleneck: 1x1 expand → 5x5 dwconv → SE → 1x1 projection.

groups.name: MBConv Block 4a
groups.description: MBConv bottleneck: 1x1 expand → 3x3 dwconv → SE → 1x1 projection.

groups.description: MBConv bottleneck: 1x1 expand → 3x3 dwconv → SE → 1x1 projection.

groups.name: MBConv Block 5a
